source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 4 - Selective Ordnance Jettison

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm Switch to ON.

steps.action: Consult SMS (Stores Management System) page's wingform to see what is loaded on what pylon
steps.voiced: Check SMS page wingform to identify what is loaded on each pylon.

steps.action: Select store you want to jettison (Left Inner, Right Inner, Left Outer, Right Outer, Center) using the LI, RI, LO, RO, CTR pushbuttons
steps.voiced: Select the store to jettison using LI, RI, LO, RO, or CTR pushbuttons.

steps.action: Rotate the Selective Jettison knob to desired release mode (we will use RACK/LCHR). L FUS MSL and R FUS MSL are used to jettison AIM-7 or AIM-120 missiles attached to the fuselage RACK/LCHR drops the weapon and its launcher rack STORES drops the weapon but not its attachment rack
steps.voiced: Rotate Selective Jettison knob to desired release mode — RACK/LCHR or STORES.

steps.action: Press and hold the red JETT (Jettison) button to jettison ordnance.
steps.voiced: Press and hold the red JETT button to jettison.

steps.action: Return Selective Jettison knob back to SAFE 4 - SELECTIVE ORDNANCE JETTISON Emergency Jettison Button
steps.voiced: Return Selective Jettison knob to SAFE.
